name: codemap
description: Interactive flowcharts, call graphs, and AI-assisted code understanding for Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, and IDL in VS Code.

commands.title: CodeMap: Show Flowchart for Current Function
CodeMap: Show Call Graph for File
CodeMap: Generate Debug Probes at Breakpoint
CodeMap: Ask a Debug Question at This Point
CodeMap: Export Debug Probes as Script

editor/context.when: resourceLangId == python || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == javascriptreact || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == typescriptreact || resourceLangId == idl || resourceExtname == .pro

resourceLangId == python || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == javascriptreact || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == typescriptreact || resourceLangId == idl || resourceExtname == .pro

resourceLangId == python || resourceExtname == .py || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == javascriptreact || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == typescriptreact || resourceLangId == idl || resourceExtname == .pro

editor/title/context.when: resourceLangId == python || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == javascriptreact || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == typescriptreact || resourceLangId == idl || resourceExtname == .pro

resourceLangId == python || resourceExtname == .py || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == javascriptreact || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == typescriptreact || resourceLangId == idl || resourceExtname == .pro

explorer/context.when: resourceLangId == python || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == javascriptreact || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == typescriptreact || resourceLangId == idl || resourceExtname == .pro

resourceLangId == python || resourceExtname == .py || resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == javascriptreact || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == typescriptreact || resourceLangId == idl || resourceExtname == .pro

codemap.pythonPath.description: Path to a Python 3 interpreter used to run the static analyzer. If blank, uses 'python' on PATH.

codemap.workspace.maxFiles.description: Cap on number of source files to index in workspace graph.

codemap.useJedi.description: If true and the 'jedi' package is installed in the analyzer's interpreter, use it to upgrade unresolved call sites with type-aware resolution.

codemap.narration.autoGenerate.description: Automatically generate Copilot narration for newly rendered graphs using the preferred or automatically selected model.

scripts.compile: npm run compile:ext && npm run bundle:webview
